title: StudyAI
description: StudyAI lets users upload videos or YouTube links, with an interactive transcript and AI chatbot that comprehends the videos for relevant Q&A, summaries, and quizzes.

title: SmartVision
description: Leverages canvas API and machine learning models for handwriting recognition. Includes logistic regression, CNNs and FNNs to classify and identify canvas number drawings.

title: RESTful API
description: This is a deployed RESTful API for managing employee data. It allows you to perform CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations on employee records.

title: Budget App
description: This application uses Object Oriented Programming in Java to help provide an overview of an individual's money flow and to assist them in managing it by setting budgets.

title: Portfolio
description: This is my personal portfolio website, showcasing my projects, skills, and experiences. Includes many features, but built from scratch no libraries.

title: StarWars Form
description: This web application provided experience in creating an API and using a 3rd party API, it allows users to submit and retrieve Star Wars related information.

title: Froggsite
description: This website is a fun way to display my web-dev skills with HTML and CSS and my knowledge of applications and client-side scripting with JavaScript.

title: Word Games
description: This project features word-guessing games implemented in Python; it offers two popular variants: Hangman and Wordle which use and extend from the same abstract class.

title: Sprint
description: This is a versatile web application designed to streamline Agile and Scrum managing by facilitating efficient tracking and organization of user stories.
